text: To live a healthy life, it's important to focus on both your body and mind. A balanced diet gives you the energy you need. Try to eat plenty of fruits, vegetables, and whole grains, and limit sugary snacks. Regular exercise, even just a 30-minute walk each day, strengthens your heart and improves your mood. Sleep is also crucial; aim for seven to nine hours each night to help your body recover. Finally, don't forget your mental health. Managing stress through hobbies or talking to friends is important. Finding a good work-life balance allows you to relax and enjoy time with family, making you happier and healthier overall.
